title: Speed Test (python fallback)
command:
python3 -c 'import time, urllib.request; url="https://speed.hetzner.de/1MB.bin"; start=time.time(); total=0; print("BACKEND=python3");
with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=20) as r:
    while True:
        chunk=r.read(65536)
        if not chunk:
            break
        total += len(chunk)
elapsed=max(time.time()-start, 1e-6)
print(f"DL_BYTES={total}")
print(f"DL_SECONDS={elapsed:.3f}")
print(f"DOWNLOAD_MBPS={total*8/elapsed/1000000:.2f}")'
notes: Last-resort speed test using Python stdlib only. Keeps the page usable when curl/wget-specific flows are unavailable.
